data.title: Bai Lian Cheng Shen 3
data.synopsis:
To resurrect his beloved Ning Yudie, Luo Zheng embarks on a heaven-defying path unlike any before. At the Tianyu Realm, he turns against Tianqiong, yet beneath the Shenqi Tower, they fight together. Through blurred lines of love and hatred, and trials that temper flesh and bone, he forges his path to divinity. Now, having ascended to the superior realm, Luo Zheng is determined to break the chains of fate and become the one truly free from destiny's grasp... But a deadly threat that exists beyond even heaven's will is now closing in.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Wuzhuang Fengbao
data.synopsis:
The young human Wang Dong vowed to avenge his parents and joined the Storm Squad, determined to exterminate the Zhage insect species across the solar system. Through hardships, he awakened his Blade Warrior powers, upgraded his armor and skills, and ultimately uncovered the insects' ultimate plot on Earth along with his team. Facing overwhelming swarms, Wang activated his ultimate Blade Warrior form and defeated both human traitors and the insect leader Ying Yuan.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Kulou Jingling's (骷髅精灵) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Da Zhou Zhen Hun Ren
data.synopsis:
In order to resist the foreign evil organization that intends to destroy the Great Zhou Kingdom, the genius wizard Zuo Xiao gathered four sacred artifacts, practiced the five elements magic, protected the dragon veins of the Great Zhou Kingdom, and defeated the foreign evil forces one by one.

(Source: Youku, Google translated)

data.title: Heiye Qishi
data.synopsis:
In 2145, a century after the nuclear apocalypse triggered by the "New Human Project," which aimed to fully unleash humanity's potential, the surviving humans established a new social order on the wasteland. In this new world built upon technology, superpowers, and magic, Jiang Li, the only "complete New Human," awakens from hibernation and begins his legendary story.

(Source: Youku, translated)

data.title: Dongda Gao Wu Xueyuan
data.synopsis:
Orphan Qin Yu was specially admitted to the top cultivation academy, Dongda Martial Academy. Behind the city's calm, a demonic threat quietly approached. Qin Yu vowed to lead his fellow disciples to resist the invading demons.

(Source: Youku)

titles.title: Threads of Fate: A War Untold

data.title: Shanhai Jing Mima
data.title_english: Threads of Fate: A War Untold
data.synopsis:
Shang prince Youshen Bupo rescued Jiang Li, disciple of Taiyi Sect, and the two of them traveled together, adventuring across the vast wilderness. They joined a merchant caravan, encountered heavenly tribulations, faced fierce beasts, defeated bandits, and rescued the heroine… Bound together by fate, the two became embroiled in a great war between the Xia and Shang dynasties.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of A Pu's (阿菩) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Wan Ye Zhi Zhu
data.synopsis:
Prince Ning Ming was chosen by a demon star and became the source of corruption in the world. To discover his origins and cleanse the corruption, he joined a secret agency. On his quest for the truth, the powerful Lord of the Ming granted Ning Ming extraordinary abilities, the supreme Emperor of the Zhou protected him, the daring Nightingale sisters favored him, and various prodigies willingly risked everything to help him cleanse the world of corruption. As he neared the truth, Ning Ming witnessed the world's cruelty and vowed to eliminate all corruption and save humanity.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Wan Ye Zhi Zhu
data.synopsis:
Prince Ning Ming was chosen by a demon star and became the source of corruption in the world. To discover his origins and cleanse the corruption, he joined a secret agency. On his quest for the truth, the powerful Lord of the Ming granted Ning Ming extraordinary abilities, the supreme Emperor of the Zhou protected him, the daring Nightingale sisters favored him, and various prodigies willingly risked everything to help him cleanse the world of corruption. As he neared the truth, Ning Ming witnessed the world's cruelty and vowed to eliminate all corruption and save humanity.

(Source: Youku)

data.title: Kimi-iro, Boku-iro
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Kimi-iro, Boku-iro by Konomi Suzuki and Kashitaro Ito. The song was featured as the ending for Isekai Quartet 3.

data.title: Fan Ying
data.synopsis:
The Pure Sea's currents flow from north to south, constantly flowing through this world. People build homes and thrive on the backs of giant beasts. Every wish has its response. The deity known as Fan Ying warns that only by letting your wishes run wild can you reap the rewards of miracles and survive. However, the unchanging rules are about to change, and those who transcend fate will eventually follow the origin of all things.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: Sheng Xu
data.synopsis:
The vast sea turns to dust, the thunder and lightning cease, and the mist approaches the earth once again. The shackles of the world are once again unlocked, and a brand new world unveils a mysterious corner...

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Chen Dong's (辰东) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Wu Dong Qian Kun 7th Season
data.synopsis: Seventh season of Wu Dong Qian Kun.

data.title: Xingchen Bian 7th Season
data.synopsis:
The descent of Mount Tianzun and the appearance of the Spiritual Treasure Cauldron ignited a frenzied struggle among the God-Kings for the "Azure Heaven Seal," the "Earth Seal," and the "Seal of Ten Thousand People." Qin Yu, a new father, is drawn into a conflict with powerful enemies like the Blood Sea Queen to save his brother Hou Fei. When Jiang Lan obtains the Earth Seal and becomes the target of everyone's anger, Qin Yu displays astonishing strength, intimidating the assembled heroes. However, the appearance of the Seal of Ten Thousand People brought even more brutal bloodshed. The Blood Sea Queen, disregarding the bloodshed of the God-Kings to seize the Seal of Ten Thousand People, Qin Yu, in a rage, slays powerful enemies to reclaim it. To end this conflict, he devises a scheme, luring those who coveted the seal into his mysterious domain, where he settles old scores. Ultimately, the three seals merge, and a new Heavenly Venerable is born. However, old grudges remain unresolved, and a Heavenly Venerable-level expert comes seeking revenge, triggering unexpected consequences. Qin Yu's fate thus embarks on an unknown realm beyond the imagination of all the God-Kings.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Quanzhi Fashi VII
data.synopsis:
After the Flame Witch incident, Mo Fan returned to his training at the Magic City Academy, but at the most crucial moment, news suddenly arrived that his good friend Zhang Xiaohou had gone missing. The sentimental Mo Fan immediately halted his competition and, together with his vampire friend Liu Ru, rush to the ancient capital, venturing into the heart of the region where demons were active.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Quanzhi Fashi Tebie Pian: Beiyuan Weiji
全职法师特别篇之北原危机
The Almighty Mage SP: Beiyuan Crisis

data.title: Quanzhi Fashi Tebie Pian: Beiyuan Weiji
data.title_english: The Almighty Mage SP: Beiyuan Crisis
data.title_japanese: 全职法师特别篇之北原危机
data.synopsis:
Mo Fan, Lingling, Zhao Manyan, and others come to Beiyuan to investigate the mysterious destruction of Beiyuan Village. During their investigation, they discover that it was the work of Leng Jue of the Black Church, who was parasitized by the Red Beast, who colluded with the evil forces of Nile. They also discover that there is an even bigger conspiracy behind them. When faced with the Red Beast's trap again, what actions will Mo Fan and his companions take?

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Lun Hui Leyuan
data.synopsis:
Traversing countless worlds, reborn through endless quests, a blood-stained pact forged a night of beheadings. A merciless blade swept across the seven paradises, scattering countless heads and transforming the hunter Su Xiao into a terrifying symbol. Yet, even as killing became a daily routine, life and death a minor matter, he could not forget the death of his parents. The sinister smile of the gray gentleman beneath his hat, the eerie totems rising from corpses, and the oppressive might of the ancient god in the darkness gradually revealed the truth of that year. Chasing the true culprit, carrying on the legacy of the extermination of the law, and restoring balance to the elements became his inevitable destiny.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Shenhai Yujin
data.synopsis:
Zhou Ming travels back in time and becomes Captain Duncan of the Lost Homeland, a terrifying evil god known as the Moving Scourge. In this deep-sea world created by an ancient god, the old order has been shattered, and isolated island cities are the only remaining lights of civilization. Yet, the shadows of the past lurk within the depths. Captain Duncan leads a diverse crew, delving into the perilous depths, and gradually begins to uncover history, glimpsing a glimpse of a despairing truth.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Wanmei Shijie Movie: Jiu Jie Fen Tian
完美世界 剧场版 九劫焚天

data.title: Wanmei Shijie Movie: Jiu Jie Fen Tian
data.title_japanese: 完美世界 剧场版 九劫焚天
data.synopsis:
The story focuses on the final battle of the Immortal Ancient Era. The ancestral spirit, the Willow God, steps forward to lead the people in their search for hope. The Desolate Emperor, Shi Hao, uses a drop of his true blood to create a clone, reversing time and space to descend into the Immortal Ancient Era. In a shared struggle of life and death, he seeks the ultimate remedy to eradicate darkness. A great catastrophe of darkness descends, marking the tragic final chapter of the Immortal Ancient Era!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Tunshi Xingkong Movie: Juezhan Yuanshi Xing
吞噬星空剧场版 决战原始星
Swallowed Star: Showdown on Primeval Star

data.title: Tunshi Xingkong Movie: Juezhan Yuanshi Xing
data.title_english: Swallowed Star: Showdown on Primeval Star
data.title_japanese: 吞噬星空剧场版 决战原始星
data.synopsis:
During Luo Feng's training on the Primeval Star, he remains calm despite the covetousness and encirclement of alien races. He uses his wisdom and strength to fight back and uphold the dignity of humanity. "I have a blade that can cleave the universe!" That breathtakingly beautiful battle blade accompanies Luo Feng as he slashes his way through the world! The Demon Race, the Mechanical Race, and the Insect Race reappear, forming a three-race alliance. The leaders of the three races, along with 6,000 Universe Venerables, besiege Luo Feng. Luo Feng unleashes the powerful force of "I Am the Universe," annihilating them in one fell swoop.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Zhan Shen Movie: Cang Nan Zhi Shang
斩神剧场版 沧南之殇
Slay the Gods Movie: The Dead of Cangnan

data.title: Zhan Shen Movie: Cang Nan Zhi Shang
data.title_english: Slay the Gods Movie: The Dead of Cangnan
data.title_japanese: 斩神剧场版 沧南之殇
data.synopsis:
After the release of the divine artifact Shiva's Wrath, Cangnan City faces an unprecedented crisis. With the Western evil gods lurking in their wake, are the Chinese gods about to awaken? Infused with the power of the twin gods, Lin Qiye joins the Night Watchmen of Cangnan City in fighting against the Western evil gods and defending Cangnan! The Second War of the Gods is about to begin!

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Jian Lai 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
After the Li Zhu Grotto-Heaven collapses, Chen Ping’an takes on a great responsibility to escort Li Baoping and the others to Great Sui to study. Their journey is extremely dangerous, with enemies and supernatural threats along the way, but they receive help from the mysterious swordsman A Liang and other powerful figures. Traveling far and fighting countless battles, the young man grows stronger while learning the weight of responsibility.

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Fenghuo Xi Zhuhou's (烽火戏诸侯) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Jian Lai Movie: Shisan Zhi Zheng
剑来院线剧场版 十三之争

data.title: Jian Lai Movie: Shisan Zhi Zheng
data.title_japanese: 剑来院线剧场版 十三之争
data.synopsis:
Set against a thousand-year war between the Human Clan and the Demon Clan, the story follows a 13 vs. 13 death match, where seven victories decide life and death.

While the humans secure six early wins through tactical foresight, a hidden scheme emerges—one that could determine the fate of the Sword Qi Great Wall.

(Source: Tencent YouTube Channel)

data.title: Douluo Dalu: 9528
data.synopsis:
Tang San and Xiao Wu return to the Slaughter City, ravaged by the Blood Swan's Kiss. ​​They're hunted down by the mutated Slaughter King. A mysterious girl intervenes to save them, but a hidden agenda lies behind the scenes. Together, they'll uncover the truth behind the Slaughter City.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: No Money
data.synopsis: Music video for the song No Money by RIM.

data.title: Lingjing Xingzhe
data.synopsis:
The story features a distinct world setting, a diverse genre, and bizarre and treacherous spirit realm dungeons. The protagonist, Zhang Yuanqing, becomes a night-wandering deity thanks to a mysterious black card, only to be caught in a maelstrom of conspiracy pitting good against evil.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
